label: Now · Current Role
title: Bringing AI to Radiation Oncology
demoCaption: OncoStudio — AI auto-contouring of organs and tumors on CT/MR
lead: As CTO and Head of Global Business, I lead the technology and global expansion of Oncosoft — an end-to-end AI software ecosystem bringing precision and efficiency to radiation oncology.

blocks.label: Problem
blocks.text: Radiation therapy planning depends on manual organ and tumor contouring on CT/MR — slow, variable between clinicians, and a bottleneck to treating more patients.

blocks.label: Approach
blocks.text: OncoStudio auto-contours organs-at-risk and tumors in about a minute through a zero-click workflow integrated with PACS, TPS, and EMR. It anchors a full platform — OncoFlow, OncoStudio, OncoPlan, and OncoRPT — spanning imaging, planning, delivery, and follow-up.

blocks.label: Impact
blocks.text: Captured 25% domestic market share and ranked #1 in clinical performance benchmarks by leading Japanese research institutions, with 300,000+ patient cases processed. I lead R&D and global expansion across the US, Latin America, Southeast Asia, and the Middle East.

gallery.caption: Meeting clinicians and partners at a global oncology conference
Receiving the International Symposium Award — 5th KSMP-JSMP-KAMPiNA Joint Symposium at AAPM, 2025

label: Flagship Career Impact · 2020–2023
title: AI Cloud Platform for 3D-Bioprinted Wound Regeneration
lead: An AI platform that turns a single tablet photo of a wound into a ready-to-print 3D patch model in seconds — then bio-prints it at the point of care to treat diabetic foot ulcers, deployed across the US, Asia, the Middle East, and Latin America.

blocks.label: Problem
blocks.text: Personalized regenerative patches require precise scanning, CAD modeling, and bioprinting — work that a surgical team anywhere in the world cannot realistically do at the point of care. To reach patients globally, the hard part had to disappear into software.

blocks.label: Approach
blocks.text: We built an AI platform (AiD Regen) that, from a single tablet RGB-D photo, segments the wound, reconstructs its 3D surface, and generates a ready-to-print 3D model in about 30 seconds. Production-grade MLOps on Google Cloud (Vertex AI, GKE) delivers identical quality at any clinical site — no on-site AI specialist required.

blocks.label: Impact
blocks.text: Founded and scaled the AI department from zero to 15, achieved both FDA and CE clearance, and drove the full commercial cycle from MVP to $1B+ in long-term contracts across the US, India, Turkey, the Middle East, and Latin America. Launched on AWS in 6 months, then migrated to Google Cloud in 3 — the work became a featured Google Cloud customer story.

gallery.caption: Point-of-care application in the operating room
